summary: Frontend testing for SplitButton dropdown replacement with inline action buttons in DataTableComponent. All tests PASSED. The new design shows 3 icon buttons (eye blue for Detail, comment green for Chat, trash red for Supprimer) instead of the old dropdown menu. Verified on Engins, Tags, and Utilisateurs pages.

minor.issue: Occasional 500 errors and WebSocket connection failures - external dependency, not a code issue

issues: React warning: 'class' should be 'className' in div element (line 805 in DataTableComponent.jsx)
React warning: 'sortable' prop on non-boolean attribute

engins_page.grid_view: PASS - Page loads with grid/vignette view showing asset cards
engins_page.table_view_toggle: PASS - Clicking list icon switches to TABLE view
engins_page.detail_button_click: PASS - Opens EnginDetail view with form fields and map

tags_page.note: Tags page has 2 action buttons per row (Detail, Supprimer) - no Chat action

utilisateurs_page.note: Utilisateurs page has 3 action buttons per row

css_styling.lt_row_actions_class: PASS - .lt-row-actions container with flex layout and gap: 6px
css_styling.lt_row_action_btn_class: PASS - .lt-row-action-btn with 32x32px, border-radius: 8px, CSS variables for colors
css_styling.hover_effects: PASS - Scale 1.08 and box-shadow on hover

no_react_errors.result: PASS - No critical React errors, only minor warnings (key props in PrivateRoutes, SidebarMenuMain, ChatMessage)

DataTableComponent.jsx.actionTemplate_function: Lines 490-528: Replaced SplitButton with inline icon buttons
DataTableComponent.jsx.iconMap: Lines 500-504: Maps action labels to icons and colors (Detail=pi-eye blue, Chat=pi-comment green, Supprimer=pi-trash red)
DataTableComponent.jsx.lt_row_actions_container: Line 507: div with class 'lt-row-actions' and data-testid='row-actions'
DataTableComponent.jsx.button_rendering: Lines 508-524: Maps actions to buttons with CSS variables --ra-color and --ra-bg

logitag-saas.css.lt_row_actions_styles: Lines 2725-2731: Flex container with gap: 6px, centered alignment
logitag-saas.css.lt_row_action_btn_styles: Lines 2733-2757: 32x32px buttons with CSS variable colors, hover effects

critical_code_review_comments: Line 805 in DataTableComponent.jsx uses 'class' instead of 'className' - should be fixed for React best practices
React key warnings in PrivateRoutes, SidebarMenuMain, ChatMessage, DatatableComponent - minor, non-blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: SplitButton dropdown replacement with inline action buttons tested and working. DataTableComponent.jsx actionTemplate function (lines 490-528) now renders 3 icon buttons instead of SplitButton dropdown. Icons: pi-eye (blue) for Detail, pi-comment (green) for Chat, pi-trash (red) for Supprimer. CSS styles in logitag-saas.css (lines 2725-2762) with .lt-row-actions and .lt-row-action-btn classes. Old SplitButton is hidden via CSS. Tested on Engins (/view/engin/index), Tags (/tag/index), and Utilisateurs (/view/staff/index) pages. All pages show inline action buttons in TABLE view. Detail button click opens detail view correctly. External API (Omniyat) has slow response times (5-15s) and occasional 500 errors.
